label: Failed payment with duplicate balance deduction in mixed language

input.complaint: Ami 1500 taka shop-e payment korlam. Kintu app dekhayse failed, ar amar account theke 1500 taka duibar kete niyese! Please eita thik koren ar taka ফেরত দেন।

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports a duplicate payment issue. Matched transaction: TXN-11001 (payment, 1,500 BDT to MERCHANT-GROCERY-99, status: failed on Thu, 25 Jun 2026 11:20:00 GMT). Transaction evidence contradicts the complaint — payment of 1,500 BDT is marked failed, which conflicts with the reported issue. Case routed to payments ops.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Pull full payment records around  (reference: TXN-11001) and compare amount, counterparty, and timestamp for duplicate entries. Escalate to payments_ops if confirmed double debit.
expected_output.customer_reply: Double charge হওয়াটা definitely concerning। 1,500 BDT এর double charge (TXN-11001) এর বিষয়টা আমরা দেখছি। আমাদের Payments team সব transaction records review করবে এবং duplicate confirm হলে official process এ handle করা হবে। শীঘ্রই update আসবে।

rationale: The customer complained in a mixed language (Banglish) about a 1500 BDT payment failure and double deduction. The transaction history matches perfectly, showing two failed attempts back-to-back. The relevant transaction is targeted to the second anomaly (TXN-11002). The customer reply is drafted safely in clean Bengali—acknowledging the issue and reiterating PIN/OTP safety rules without giving an unauthorized absolute promise of refund (using conditional safe language instead).
